nodes.context: Polish criminal organization active in Warsaw area in 1990s, involved in car theft, drug trafficking, extortion, murder.
Splinter group from Pruszków mafia formed in 1992, became a rival organization.
Criminal group from Ożarów Mazowiecki that joined the Pruszków mafia in the first half of the 1990s.
Splinter group from Pruszków mafia formed in 2000, acted independently until 2014.

edges.context: Wołomin mafia splintered from Pruszków mafia in 1992 and became an opposing organization.
The Ożarów Mazowiecki group joined the Pruszków mafia in the first half of the 1990s.
Mokotów group splintered from Pruszków mafia in 2000 and acted independently.
